Seriously don't buy HP.

reviews.title: Five Stars

reviews.title: Excelent value laptop
reviews.text: My daughter needed a faster more copact laptop for her graphics software so we gave this one a try.  Very fast, easy setup...nice and easy to chuck the bloatware.  A reasonable price made it an easy choice...so much so that we purchased another.

reviews.title: Definitely returning and buying a different brand
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this laptop... very very very slow. I mean how can a company like HP in this day in age make a laptop this slow. I didn’t expect speeds you would see in a gaming laptop for this price but I at least want to be able to watch a movie or even start the laptop within 10 minutes, and they don’t even allow you to upgrade the RAM or anything from what I can tell... and the battery life is laughable, like a previous comment said, about 1 percent per minute. I would even go as far as to say that it dies faster than that. Purchased this for my sister for her birthday but will definitely return and go with a different laptop.

reviews.title: Liked it until .....
reviews.text:
As I began typing, I liked the smooth, quite feel BUT quickly discovered that this keyboard does NOT have a 'Print Screen' key, which is vital when working. DO NOT Buy this if you need it for work. As you can see in the picture provided, the 'F11' key is NOT labeled.
F11 toggles from Full Screen back to regular screen. The first 4 keys at the top of the number key pad are TOTALLY UNNECESSARY.
1st key) Same function as Ctrl+C (Copy)
2nd key) Does Absolutely Nothing!
3rd key) Same function as Ctrl+V, (Paste)
4th key) Same function as Ctrl+X (Cut)
Had this keyboard followed the SAME FORMAT
The keyboard is overpriced to be missing a vital function as Print Screen Key.

reviews.title: Good find!
reviews.text: I got this to keep in my work bag as a backup/when I work from home. I will say the first impression wasn't stellar. The top plastic has a cheap look/feel to it. But it also makes up in some nice touches. For example, the USB fob. I was apprehensive about the keep slot for it because there wasn't something that made it feel or look actually secured. But turns out, there's magnetic component so it gets sucked in rather than loosely placed. Battery power seems as advertised. I haven't charged mine in about a month and it's still going. Ergonomics is about what you'd expect based on the photos.

reviews.title: No more Batteries
reviews.text: Love my new mouse! Old one I would turn off and on all the time to save battery. This one I keep wanting to then remember it goes to sleep and no more batteries. First charge went fast, haven't had to charge it since. Love the self storing dongle. Should have purchased this long time ago.

reviews.title: Can’t beat this little mouse for a chromebook
reviews.text: I purchased this mouse for my daughter so she would have a lightweight mouse to use at school. It works amazing! The little USB connector is small and if you want to take it out of your computer, it’s stores nicely inside the mouse next to the battery.  If your child is looking for a small mouse that they can carry around at school easily, this is it.

reviews.text: It’s a gift to my daughter and she loves it. Vibrant color pink and it’s easy for her to use it on her laptop.

reviews.title: I SHOULD HAVE READ THE REVIEWS
reviews.text:
First off its not anywhere near purple but thats not the major issue. It arrived broken. As soon as I opened the back to look at it,it came apart! It looks like thetop is slowly working its way off. Dont know if i can return this but i sure want to. We dont have any computer stores by us so I had to get back online to find a good one and since im left handed I get to be fussy .
since finding a good one. So im going with a name ive heard of before AND CHECKING THE REVIEWS! Since i posted this ive been contacted by their customer service and i must say they
have beenverynice and helpful. They were real concerned and felt it was just a fluke that it broke. Id like to give it 5stars just for that!

reviews.title: Cool looking but not the best mouse
reviews.text:
I wanted a cool looking mouse to replace a Microsoft mouse that was starting to act funny, after 5 + years. After using it for an hour now I really wish I would have spent more for functionality rather than aesthetic value.

First of all I had to pull out a sheet of paper to use as a mouse pad because my old Microsoft mouse functioned with any surface that I used it on, performed flawlessly. This new mouse can't even be used on a standard wooden desk without skipping and jumping all over the screen.

I prepared myself mentally for a cheap feeling mouse because in the end you get what you pay for but holy cow this mouse feels like something I would buy at the local dollar store it screams lack of quality.

I am sure I will be buying another mouse to replace this one shortly either from frustration or because it was built at such a low quality standard.

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text:
Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.title: Loses Connection CONSTANTLY
reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

reviews.title: Good So Far

title: Bluetooth Mouse for iPad MacBook Air Pro Mini Mac iPhone Tablet Cell Phone, Computer Wireless Mouse for Laptop PC Desktop, Dual Mode (Bluetooth + 2.4G), Portable Optical Cordless Mice Silent (Silver)
description:
Specifications:
Bluetooth Edition: Bluetooth 5.0 Mouse Dimensions: 4.21 X 2.36 X 1.26 inchs Mouse Weight: 2.05 ounces Operating Range: Up to 33 ft/ 10 meters Buttons Number: 3 Keys DPI Level: 1600 DPI Battery Powered: 1 AA battery powered,
Battery NOT Included
The mouse supports Bluetooth and 2.4GHz USB connection
Note: The Bluetooth Mouse only compatible with iPad OS/iOS 13 and above. So you need to update the system of your ipad and iphone to iPad OS/iOS 13 and above, and turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch, then connect the mouse.
How to connect Bluetooth mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to Bluetooth. 2: Then Turn on the Bluetooth switch of your tablet or mobile phone, and search for Bluetooth mouse. 3: Click the Bluetooth mouse on tablet phone or other devices to connect to your device.
How to connect 2.4GHz USB mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to 2.4G. 2: Then insert the USB receiver into the USB port of the notebook or computer, and then you can use it.
Package Included:
1x Dual Mode Mouse (Bluetooth+2.4GHz) 1x USB Receiver 1x User Manual
Broad Compatibility:
Compatible with iPadOS iPad 10.2/9.7 5th 6th 7th 8th 9th gen, iPad Air 10.5/10.9, iPad Pro 11/12.9 2nd 3rd 4th 5th generation, iPad Mini 5/4/3, iPhone 12 11 pro max, iPhone X XS XR max, etc.
Q&A
Where is the USB receiver?
The USB receiver is in the mouse, you can find it when you open the mouse's battery cover. When you don't use it, you can plug the nano receiver into the USB storage slot again, so you don't lose the USB.
Connectivity and USB troubleshooting
Restart your computer and make sure the mouse is turned on and not too far away from the USB Receiver.
Warranty: 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.
Bluetooth mouse only compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above.
features: Wide Compatibility: The mouse compatible with Windows XP/ Vista/ 7/ 8/ 10/ 11, Chrome OS, Mac OS, Android, iOS, and perfect for laptop notebook PC computer desktop chromebook, Apple iPhone iPad, iPad Air, iPad Mini, iPad Pro, MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, Mac iMac Samsung Galaxy Tab/ Note/ S tablet smartphone Surface Pro and other multi device.【Bluetooth mouse compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above, turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch】

Dual-Mode Mouse (2.4G + Bluetooth 5.0): 2.4GHz wireless mode, plug and play, no need to download drivers. Bluetooth mode, easy to connect and pair. Both modes provide a reliable and stable connection up to 33 feet with virtually no drop-outs and delays. The wireless mouse realizes free switches between two devices with one mouse only by one click. Note: You can't use Bluetooth and 2.4G mode at the same time. The USB dongle is stored in the compartment next to the mouse battery slot.

Comfortable & Quiet Click: The wireless mouse features a hand-friendly contoured shape for all-day comfort. Quiet clicks allow you to focus on your work without worrying about disturbing others or causing unwanted distracting noises. 1600 DPI cursor sensitivity provides smooth, precise tracking and scrolling for easy navigation on most surfaces. The sturdy rubber scroll wheel prevents your hands from slipping when rolling. The nano receiver is stored on the back of the mouse.

Long Battery Life: The mouse is powered by 1 AA battery (battery is not included). The mouse will enter into auto-sleep mode after 10 minutes of inactivity, and you can click any key to wake it up. Long battery life and working time, it can be used for months without battery replacement. There is an ON/ OFF button on the back of the mouse, which can be turned off to save power. Battery NOT included.

Protable & Durable Design: The ergonomic design and smooth surface fit your hands perfectly and provide you with a comfortable experience. You can take it anywhere you need it for office, home, meetings or travel. Tested over 3 million clicks to ensure mouse durability. What You Will Get: Wireless Bluetooth Mouse, USB Receiver, User Manual, 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.

reviews.title: Kind of slow

reviews.title: I couldn't have asked for a better productivity tool
reviews.text:
This item has been with me for such a short time that I am still breaking it in. So far these are my notes.

This mouse takes advantage of both Bluetooth and 2.4G technology

The connection tends to become unstable after a few months, reconnect to solve the issue

If you are unfortunate enough to have more than one device with need for a mouse, switching between them will be time consuming and confusing due to the syncing required.

Its slim profile also makes it easy to store when not in use.

The battery life lasts for weeks

The power conserving switch saves battery life

Totally worth the price!

I hope this is helpful.

reviews.title: Comfortable to hold & easy to pair
reviews.text: My husband is using this mouse for his MacBook Pro and he says it's working great! It was easy to pair with his laptop. Just turn the bluetooth on, then press the pairing button on the back of the mouse and the devices will find each other. The mouse is comfortable for him to hold and use. He says it's quiet and responsive. We haven't had it long enough to comment on battery longevity, but so far so good.

reviews.title: Nice portable mouse
reviews.text: It seems very well made and works great on mac and windows. No complaints really-- the color is also nice.

reviews.title: I Really Needed This....
reviews.text: This bluetooth mouse is life.  I really was in desperate need due to my last mouse giving out on me.  This is compatible with my iPad and it's small enough to fit within my slim case.  The battery life, I'm not too sure.  For right now, everything else for me is a plus.
